title: Woodland Wins Houston Open
excerpt: Gary Woodland claims Houston Open title, Nicolai Højgaard finishes second
body:
Tour News: Woodland Takes Houston Open

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. Nicolai Højgaard came in second at -17, while Min Woo Lee and Michael Thorbjornsen tied for third at -12.

DP World Tour Update

Eugenio Chacarra is currently leading the DP World Tour event in India, with a four-stroke lead going into the final day. The tournament is taking place at the DLF G&CC in Gurugram, India.

LIV Golf Latest

The 4Aces GC team, led by Dustin Johnson, took the top spot at the LIV Golf event in Singapore, finishing with a score of -27. The Ripper GC team finished in second place.

Woodland\'s Score
-18
Højgaard\'s Score
-17
LIV Golf Winners
4Aces GC

Golf News Roundup

The golf world has seen some exciting events recently, with the PGA Tour, DP World Tour, and LIV Golf all taking place in various locations around the globe. As the season continues, fans can expect to see even more thrilling competitions and talented players in action.

The golf world is heating up, and we can\'t wait to see what the rest of the season has in store.
